description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a boxy architectural form. The exterior features a mix of tan and brown wall panels, large rectangular windows, and a garage integrated into the front facade. The driveway is paved with gray tiles and accommodates two vehicles, while a small green lawn and a tree add natural elements to the property. The rear of the house includes a fenced patio area with red flooring, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a fenced patio, featuring clean lines and a mix of tan and brown exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with two vehicles, main entry, and a tree on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, tan wall, and the fenced patio area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large windows, fenced patio, and the back lawn with a tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and a small tree near the sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry integrated with garage, flat overhang, no porch, minimalistic door design
